rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Setting Hearing Date On Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 24, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC, Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Setting Hearing Date On Motion For Protective Order Hearing Required. Parties to appear at 8:30 a.m. to meet and confer regarding deposition dates. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KLW INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Writ Of Administrative Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 24, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF KLW INVESTMENTS, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Writ Of Administrative Mandate DENIED. Current record is insufficient. The Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Board should reconsider the petition and develop specific facts as to whether the units are exempt under Rent Board Rules and Regulations Rule 1.17(e). As to Rule 1.17(g) there is substantial evidence in the record to sustain the Rent Board's finding that the units subject to this Writ come within the ambit of Rule 1.17(g) and are therefore subject to the rent ordinance. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRACI GRACE VS. ALVIN BAUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Including Request For Additional And Alternate Relief Under Ccp 473(B)

DEFENDANT ALVIN BAUM Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Including Request For Additional And Alternate Relief Under Ccp 473(B) continued to May 23, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 no later than April 30, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Orders 1) Lifting The Stay And 2) Striking The Answer And For The Entry Of Judgment For Possession Based On Failure To Comply With Orders To This Court Date Jul 17, 18, Aug 23, 18, Feb 6, 19 And Mar 6, 19
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 24, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Orders 1) Lifting The Stay And 2) Striking The Answer And For The Entry Of Judgment For Possession Based On Failure To Comply With Orders To This Court Date Jul 17, 18, Aug 23, 18, Feb 6, 19 And Mar 6, 19 Hearing Required. Mr. Mohanna to be present. If this motion is not granted, Mr. Mohanna to be prepared to sit for deposition and fully cooperate to the fullest extent under the Discovery Act starting at 9:30 a.m. and until the deposition is completed by Plaintiff. Plaintiff to arrange for a court reporter for deposition. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ELAN BERNSTEIN VS. BRUCE LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint (Delta Motion)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 24, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT BRUCE LIU Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint (Delta Motion) DENIED. Defendant was properly served by a registered process server and failed to rebut a presumption. Delta motion is improper Borsuk v. Appellate Div. (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. = (501/CFH)
